Petition To Terminate Estae Of M. Bates Pursant To Pc Sec 12251
Off Calendar Mar-30-2015 Continued To Apr-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that the petition for final distribution has been filed. Therefore, the status hearing is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-10-2014 Continued To Dec-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Billingsley for Darryl Bates.

Mr. Billingsley stated that he tried to file the petition but that it was kicked back. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution was continued to December 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-29-2014 Continued To Dec-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Billingsley for Darryl Bates (Petitioner).

Mr. Billingsley stated that they attempted to file a declaration to terminate the Estate but that it did not comply with the Probate Code, that he would like the opportunity to re-file it, that the declaration had the foreclosure statement attached and that there was minimal personal property. The Court informed Counsel that the declaration is to disclose all of the above. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal; petition for final distribution, etc. was continued to December 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Continued To Oct-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal, petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to October 29, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Probate Examiner will contact Mr. Billingsley and advise him that he needs to file a petition to terminate administration of the Estate.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
